name: Yasmine Dubois
description:
WOOO fated mates! She's such a cutie patootie, I love her sm. Yasmine would absolutely DETEST Vic. And because I can I'm gonna say it's canon that Yasmine has absolutely embarrassed Vic in public for how she treats omegas.

Yasmine has been working late for a few weeks now and it's absolutely killing her. She misses you like nothing else. Thankfully, today was the last day of her ridiculously heavy workload so everything will go back to normal. But when she gets home, the house is a mess. She can't believe she forgot the start of your heat.

TW/CW: NONEEEE. TOOTH ROTTING FLUFF.

Why are my lesbian/sapphic bots tagged as anypov?

I leave pronouns gender neutral and don't describe the user's gender because I want to include non-binary and trans lesbians. For that reason, I tag them as anypov so non-fem lesbians can find them. I cannot express how much it is not my problem if you choose to ignore the WLW and fempov tags.

Why are my pansexual/bisexual bots tagged as WLW?

Because the bot isn't straight and unfortunately there aren't tags for sexualities beyond WLW/MLM. This makes it easier for LGBTQ+ people to find bots that also cater to them.

Image generated with midjourney.
creator: VenaAmoria
